site.name: Mohetios.dev

site.footer: Built slowly. Written honestly. Kept open.

lab.description: Prototypes, research fragments, and ideas still being tested.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Open-source work, practical tools, and product systems.

items.smallUseful: Build small, useful things before giving them large names.
items.preservePath: Write the path, not only the polished result.
items.clearInterfaces: Prefer clear interfaces, stable tools, and honest constraints.
items.openWorkshop: Keep the work open enough to be reviewed, forked, and improved.

cta.description: Read the notes, inspect the projects, and trace the decisions behind the systems.

newsletter.pending: Please check your inbox to confirm your subscription.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.

comments.title: Discussion
comments.moderationNote: Thoughtful comments, corrections, and questions are welcome. Comments are reviewed before publishing.
comments.success: Thanks — your comment is waiting for review.
comments.error: Your comment could not be submitted. Please try again.
comments.empty: No comments yet. Start the discussion.
comments.privacyNote: Your email is used only for moderation updates. It is not shown publicly.

validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.nameMax: Name must be 80 characters or less.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.emailMax: Email must be 254 characters or less.
validation.commentMax: Comment must be 4000 characters or less.
validation.htmlNotAllowed: HTML is not allowed in comments.
validation.maxLinks: Comments may include at most 2 links.
validation.rateLimitIp: You can post up to 2 comments every 5 minutes. Please wait and try again.
validation.rateLimitEmail: You can post up to 3 comments every 12 hours with this email. Please try again later.
validation.rateLimitReply: You can post 1 reply every 5 minutes. Please wait and try again.
validation.rateLimitGraph: Too many requests right now. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.message: Please write a little more context.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what you are building, what you need, and what kind of collaboration you have in mind.
form.privacyNote: Your message goes directly to my private inbox. No newsletter, no automated marketing.

success.title: Message received.
success.description: Thanks for reaching out. I will review the context and reply if there is a clear fit.

error.title: Message could not be sent.
error.description: Please try again in a moment.
error.migration: The contact inbox table is missing. Apply the latest database migration.
error.verificationDescription: Please complete the verification before sending your message.

sidebar.label: Open for thoughtful work
sidebar.title: Useful context helps me reply better.
sidebar.description: A clear message about the problem, product, timeline, and expected role is more useful than a generic intro.

work.title: Best fit
work.description: Product engineering, frontend architecture, AI workflows, dashboards, and practical technical writing.

response.title: Response style
response.description: I prioritize specific messages with real context over broad or automated outreach.
